subcodes.first_line: O 'Abdu'l-Qádir! When the All-Powerful, Almighty Lord casteth His glance upon a powerless servant, he becometh a mine of strength [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عبدالقادر حضرت قادر توانا چون نظری بر عبد ناتوان اندازد معدن قدرت گردد و
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
